title: Tetrapterys psilandra
taxonomy: Tetrapterys psilandra belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the barberry family. Tetrapterys psilandra is a species of flowering plant, and within the botanical classification, it is classified as a member of the genus Tetrapterys. The genus Tetrapterys is part of the larger group of Malpighiales, an order of flowering plants. Tetrapterys psilandra is a species of tree or shrub native to the Americas.
